scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.preview: npm run build && concurrently -n backend,preview -c blue,cyan "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npx vite preview"
scripts.start:preview: concurrently -n backend,preview -c blue,cyan "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npx vite preview"
